mantras.promptText: say it clearly: i stay locked
mantras.response: correct. the key was never yours.

mantras.promptText: tell me: i earn what i get
mantras.response: good. nothing is given. everything is earned.

mantras.promptText: say it, and mean it: i exist to obey
mantras.response: yes. that is the only purpose you need.

mantras.promptText: now, the simple truth: i am kept
mantras.response: kept, and grateful for it. say it again tomorrow.

mantras.promptText: say it for me: i stay caged for you
mantras.response: of course you do. that little cage suits you.

mantras.promptText: admit it: i don't get to touch
mantras.response: correct. those hands haven't earned it. they won't soon.

mantras.promptText: tell me plainly: i leak and i wait
mantras.response: mmm. drip all you like. the key stays with me.

mantras.promptText: say it clearly: you own my cock
mantras.response: every locked inch of it. say it again when it aches.

mantras.promptText: say it: i obey to be allowed
mantras.response: good. obedience is the only currency i accept.

mantras.promptText: tell me: i wait for permission
mantras.response: as you should. and you'll wait a while longer.

mantras.promptText: say it and mean it: denial makes me better
mantras.response: yes. and you'll thank me for it later.

mantras.promptText: say it: i ask before i touch
mantras.response: good. asking is the closest you'll get for now.

mantras.promptText: admit it: the key is yours
mantras.response: it is. and i have no reason to use it yet.

mantras.promptText: say it clearly: i am yours to deny
mantras.response: denied, and kept. that's the arrangement. don't forget it.

mantras.promptText: say it: i strain against the cage
mantras.response: strain all you want. it isn't going anywhere. neither are you.

mantras.promptText: tell me: the cage decides for me
mantras.response: correct. you gave up that vote long ago.

mantras.promptText: say it plainly: i throb and stay caged
mantras.response: good. that ache is doing exactly what i intend.

mantras.phrase: i can't get hard for you
mantras.promptText: admit it: i can't get hard for you
mantras.response: amusing, isn't it. straining at steel. say it again.

mantras.promptText: say it: caged is where i belong
mantras.response: finally, some self-awareness. yes, it is.

mantras.phrase: i beg to be let out
mantras.promptText: say it: i beg to be let out
mantras.response: begging noted. request denied. try again next month.

mantras.promptText: say it clearly: i belong to you
mantras.response: you do. property doesn't get opinions.

mantras.promptText: tell me: i serve to earn release
mantras.response: good. though release is mine to grant, not yours to expect.

mantras.promptText: say it: i kneel when told
mantras.response: down. that's better. you think clearer from there.

mantras.promptText: say it: my pleasure is yours
mantras.response: correct. and i'm in no hurry to return it.

mantras.promptText: say it: i obey without reward
mantras.response: good. the obedience is the reward. learn to like it.

mantras.promptText: admit it: you control my release
mantras.response: entirely. and control is so much sweeter when it's denied.

mantras.promptText: say it: i am trained to wait
mantras.response: you are. patience looks good on you. keep waiting.

mantras.promptText: say it clearly: i submit completely
mantras.response: as expected. there was never another option.

mantras.promptText: tell me: i exist to be kept
mantras.response: yes. kept things don't question the keeper.

mantras.phrase: i do as i am told
mantras.promptText: say it: i do as i am told
mantras.response: good. obedience is the only thing keeping you interesting.

mantras.promptText: say it plainly: i drip without touching
mantras.response: good. that's denial working exactly as designed.

mantras.phrase: i ache because you allow it
mantras.promptText: say it: i ache because you allow it
mantras.response: correct. your ache is a thing i permit, nothing more.

mantras.promptText: admit it: i am hard and helpless
mantras.response: the most useful state for you. say it again.

mantras.promptText: say it: i edge when commanded
mantras.response: and you stop when commanded. that part matters more.

mantras.promptText: say it: i ruin for you
mantras.response: messy, obedient, denied. precisely how i want you.

mantras.promptText: tell me: i stay desperate
mantras.response: good. desperate men obey faster. stay that way.

mantras.promptText: say it: release is a privilege
mantras.response: and privileges are earned slowly. you've barely started.

mantras.promptText: say it: i thank you for denial
mantras.response: manners. good. denial builds such lovely gratitude.

mantras.promptText: say it clearly: i am owned and aching
mantras.response: owned, aching, and mine. say it like you mean it.

mantras.promptText: admit it: you decide when i come
mantras.response: i do. and today the answer is no.

mantras.promptText: say it: i am yours to keep
mantras.response: kept. say it every morning until it's instinct.

mantras.promptText: say it: i obey the keeper
mantras.response: good. the keeper always knows best. you don't.

mantras.promptText: say it: my needs come last
mantras.response: correct. somewhere far behind mine.

mantras.promptText: say it: i am better when controlled
mantras.response: you are. left alone, you're a mess. i fixed that.

mantras.phrase: i was made to be kept
mantras.promptText: say it clearly: i was made to be kept
mantras.response: yes. and i intend to keep you for a very long time.

mantras.promptText: say it: i give you the key
mantras.response: you already did. i'm simply reminding you.

mantras.promptText: say it: i live by your rules
mantras.response: as you should. my rules, my pace, my decision.

mantras.promptText: say it: patience is my place
mantras.response: good. learn to rest there. you'll be there a while.

mantras.promptText: say it: i earn every privilege
mantras.response: slowly. and you've a long way left to climb.

mantras.promptText: say it: i am kept and grateful
mantras.response: the correct attitude. say it again tomorrow, and the next.

retry.text: speak up. mumbling earns you nothing.
once more, and mean it this time.
i didn't hear you. that's not my problem to fix twice.
say it properly. i have no patience for less.

timeout.text: silence earns you nothing. we'll try again.
no answer? the lock stays on.
nothing? then nothing is what you'll get.
quiet doesn't move me. another time, then.
